title: FX regime dossiers build empty (EURUSD n_bars=0, all bars unlabeled) — fx Loop A is blocked
source: phase5-hypothesizer persona experiment, multi-asset dossier review (2026-05-28)
why: DIAGNOSED (2026-05-28, systematic-debugging): NOT a build bug. Reproduced via `build_all_regimes --assets EURUSD,GBPUSD,USDJPY --force`: EURUSD D1 = skipped_insufficient_history (1297 bars < min_bars 1460 = burn-in 1260 + 200); EURUSD H4 = skipped_no_labeled_bars (0 labeled / 7786 bars) because the 5y H4 vol-percentile burn-in is 252*6*5 = 7560 bars, leaving ~106 computable bars at the tail < the 240-bar (40*6) min_dwell, so no label confirms. The builder correctly writes NOTHING when n_labeled==0 (B0066, tested in tests/phase5/test_build_all_regimes.py). The empty fx dossiers were STALE pre-B0066 artifacts (n_unlabeled_bars=7786 = the H4 bar count) and are now gone (untracked, git-clean; XAU/XAG/BTC/ETH dossiers intact). Root blocker is INSUFFICIENT FX HISTORY, not code.
value_rationale: Correctness/data bug that silently blocks an entire asset class from the research loop.
scope: RESOLVED: the empty-dossier symptom (stale pre-B0066 artifacts) is cleared; the current builder correctly skips fx and writes nothing. No code fix to the builder is warranted.

REMAINING BLOCKER (data): acquire longer fx history so the 5y-percentile labeler can produce labels. Need ~>=15y D1 (have 1297 bars ~5y) OR enough H4 to clear burn-in 7560 + min_dwell 240 with margin (have 7786, ~just over burn-in). Source: MT5 pull or equivalent long-history fx CSVs.

ALTERNATIVELY (methodology, do NOT do lightly): a per-asset shorter vol_pct_window_years for short-history assets would change the regime definition and break cross-asset comparability — only with a spec.

OBSERVED (separate latent risk, not B0069): dossier path signals/regime_stats/<asset>/<regime>.json is NOT frequency-namespaced, so D1 and H4 builds for the same asset overwrite each other's dossiers. Worth its own B-ID if multi-freq dossiers are needed.
recommendation: Keep fx OUT of Loop A asset_scope until longer fx history is loaded (Loop A LRU already skips sample_insufficient, so it degrades gracefully). Treat as blocked-on-data, not a code bug.
out_of_scope: Adding new fx features (tracked separately under the feature-expansion entry).

history.from: signals/regime_stats/EURUSD/BULL_QUIET.json reports n_bars=0, n_episodes=0, features_quantile_summary={}, n_unlabeled_bars=7786 — i.e. the entire fx series is unlabeled, so no regime-conditional evaluation is possible. Likely the fx regime labeler/feature-join produced no labeled bars (burn-in, missing macro join, or a frequency/path issue in the multi-asset build). Until fixed, Loop A cannot explore any fx asset.
history.to: DIAGNOSED (2026-05-28, systematic-debugging): NOT a build bug. Reproduced via `build_all_regimes --assets EURUSD,GBPUSD,USDJPY --force`: EURUSD D1 = skipped_insufficient_history (1297 bars < min_bars 1460 = burn-in 1260 + 200); EURUSD H4 = skipped_no_labeled_bars (0 labeled / 7786 bars) because the 5y H4 vol-percentile burn-in is 252*6*5 = 7560 bars, leaving ~106 computable bars at the tail < the 240-bar (40*6) min_dwell, so no label confirms. The builder correctly writes NOTHING when n_labeled==0 (B0066, tested in tests/phase5/test_build_all_regimes.py). The empty fx dossiers were STALE pre-B0066 artifacts (n_unlabeled_bars=7786 = the H4 bar count) and are now gone (untracked, git-clean; XAU/XAG/BTC/ETH dossiers intact). history.reason: reframe as data blocker + record latent freq-collision observation
from: Diagnose why EURUSD (and other fx) dossiers have n_bars=0 / all-unlabeled after the multi-asset regime build.
Confirm whether it is build-wide for fx or per-regime, across EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDJPY.
Fix the labeler/feature join so fx dossiers populate, then re-run the dossier build.
to: RESOLVED: the empty-dossier symptom (stale pre-B0066 artifacts) is cleared; the current builder correctly skips fx and writes nothing. No code fix to the builder is warranted.

history.from: Verify before attempting any fx Loop A tick; the dossier prerequisite check should flag n_bars=0 as a hard error, not produce an empty sample_insufficient dossier.
history.to: Keep fx OUT of Loop A asset_scope until longer fx history is loaded (Loop A LRU already skips sample_insufficient, so it degrades gracefully). Treat as blocked-on-data, not a code bug.

history.reason: Root cause is insufficient fx history (D1 1297<1460 bars; H4 burn-in 7560 starves min_dwell). No builder code bug (B0066 correct). Stale empty dossiers cleared. Blocked on fx data acquisition.
chore(backlog): quiesce cross-session reconciliation + B0079 prereq + B0068 done

Resolved: pulled full 27y MT5 history for EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDJPY D1 (6860-6861 bars from 2000-01-03) via mt5_pull_xau_d1.py --symbol. The old 1297-bar CSVs were limited by a short lookback; the script pulls from datetime(2000,1,1) and returns what the broker has. EURUSD: 5582 labeled bars, 30 episodes. GBPUSD: 5556 bars, 34 ep. USDJPY: 5534 bars, 34 ep. Regime parquets + fx dossiers built; asset_scope updated in loop_a_state.json. Commit 862f1ac.
chore(backlog): B0069 done â€” FX Loop A unblocked
